svg.text: PySpark 3.5.3 · Delta Lake 3.2.1 · Snowflake · Databricks · Airflow 2.9.3 · dbt 1.8.7 · dbt Cloud Studio
SILVER — 3-Gate Validation · 10 Cleaning Logics · SCD2 · Incremental
dbt: relationships test, LEFT JOIN + IS NULL check
Output: Only PASS + WARN records promoted → Gold | FAIL records → quarantine table + Airflow alert
great_expectations + dbt test validate every gate before promotion
GOLD — Business Layer · 3 Facts + 3 Dims · RBAC · Immutable
py: snowflake-connector-python · dbt-core · great-expectations | RBAC: GOLD_READER / GOLD_WRITER
Process: Schema enforcement, DLT expectations, Unity lineage
pyspark.sql: SparkSession, DataFrame API, Structured Streaming
Process: Gate 1-2 transforms, OPTIMIZE, ZORDER, VACUUM
dbt-snowflake: snowflake adapter | dbt-databricks: spark adapter
Process: Gate 2-3 SQL transforms, dbt test, dbt docs, snapshots
Process: Gate 3 late-data handling, Snowpipe monitoring, CDC
All failures trigger Airflow on_failure_callback → EmailOperator (default) | PagerDuty (CRITICAL) | SlackWebhookOperator (WARN)
RBAC (4 roles) · Gold 7 Commandments · Unity Catalog · Key Vault · AES-256 · TLS 1.2+
Incremental · Surrogate keys · ZORDER clustering · Window fns (LAG/ROW_NUMBER) · NULLIF · COALESCE · SPC composite
